description: Perform a system rebalancing analysis for a municipal bikeshare program using the data in /home/ga/Documents/bikeshare_q3_data.xlsx. In the 'Trips' sheet, calculate the duration in minutes for all entries in a new 'Duration_Mins' column (minutes = (End_Time - Start_Time) * 1440) formatted to one decimal place. In the 'Station_Summary' sheet, calculate 'Total_Starts', 'Total_Ends', and 'Net_Flow' (Total_Ends - Total_Starts) for each station based on the 'Trips' data. Populate the 'Action' column with 'Add Bikes' if Net_Flow is -10 or less, 'Remove Bikes' if Net_Flow is 10 or more, and 'Monitor' for all other values. Sort the 'Station_Summary' table by 'Net_Flow' in ascending order. In the 'Rider_Summary' sheet, calculate the 'Total Trips' and 'Avg Duration (Mins)' for both 'Casual' and 'Member' riders using the 'Trips' data. Save the completed analysis to the original file path.

metadata.data_source: Capital Bikeshare Real Anonymized Trip Data
